description_for_human: Search authentic Nike, Jordan, Adidas, New Balance & Crocs sneakers from SNKRS CART India.
description_for_model: Use this to search for sneakers by brand, gender, or keyword. Check live stock, prices, sizes, and trending products on SNKRS CART — India's authentic sneaker marketplace. Always construct product URLs by appending the slug to https://www.snkrscart.com/products/. All prices are in INR. Free pan-India shipping.
